# Prompts Directory

Prompt templates for chat slash commands and module-building flows.

## Shared

- [_conventions.md](_conventions.md) — Single source of truth for varlock, TRY markers, secret naming, and execution conventions. Injected into other prompts automatically.

## Commands (user-facing slash commands)

- [commands/download.md](commands/download.md) — /download: generates download links for files written in the session
- [commands/guide.md](commands/guide.md) — /guide: shows loaded modules and suggests prompts to try
- [commands/introduction.md](commands/introduction.md) — /introduction: first-time setup flow that explains Context Agora and helps choose the first integration
- [commands/add_verify.md](commands/add_verify.md) — /add-verify: adds a read-only smoke test (verify.py) to an existing module
- [commands/add_script.md](commands/add_script.md) — /add-script: adds a Python script (read or write) to an existing module's scripts/
- [commands/cron_jobs.md](commands/cron_jobs.md) — /cron-jobs: view, add, modify, or remove scheduled jobs on loaded modules

## Templates (internal, not user-facing)

- [templates/add_module.md](templates/add_module.md) — Template prompt for generating a module's info.md from codebase analysis
- [templates/adapt_examples.md](templates/adapt_examples.md) — Rules for rewriting code examples to match varlock execution conventions
